description_long: This is a compact, black, semi-automatic rifle with a perforated barrel shroud and a prominent pistol grip. The receiver and barrel are constructed from metal, with the barrel featuring multiple circular vents for cooling. The magazine is a long, detachable box type, inserted vertically below the receiver. The grip appears to be made of textured polymer for improved handling, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower receiver. The rifle is equipped with simple iron sights and lacks any advanced optics or attachments, giving it a utilitarian, tactical appearance.
description: A compact black rifle with a perforated barrel shroud, long box magazine, and textured pistol grip, featuring iron sights and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, perforated shroud, and the vertical magazine below.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, the perforated barrel shroud, pistol grip, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the receiver, the magazine, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the receiver, grip, magazine, and the vented barrel shroud.
